phases_completed.summary: Broker core + IPC; live broker daemon works
Channel + plugin.Host interfaces + per-route worker substrate. c3types/channel/plugin packages, RouteWorker, WorkerPool, Broker.Shutdown.
phases_completed.self_review: Substrate for Plan 4B (Telegram) and Plan 5 (plugin host concrete impl) in place. Channel interface and plugin.Host interface declared. RouteWorker idle-timeout/stop/release-exit all tested. WorkerPool lazy-spawn + reap. Worker dispatch stubbed; real wiring deferred. 72 tests pass.

polling_and_inbound.details: getUpdates loop with allowed_updates and exponential backoff; inbound conversion for text/voice/photo/document/audio/video/video_note/sticker; ReplyContext from reply_to_message; service messages dropped (forum_topic_*, chat metadata events); 7 unit tests.

attach_proposal_flow.details: 8 unit tests with fakeChannel: DM, name in default group (silent claim), name in other group (proposes use_existing_other_group + Alternative), unknown name (proposes create), create=true (calls channel.CreateTopic + persists), topic_id (validates + registers placeholder), saved mapping (silent claim regardless of name search), already-claimed (returns holder-identifying error). Persists mappings.json atomically on every successful attach via SaveMappings().

phase_6_claude_adapter.details: MCP stdio server, broker auto-spawn, full dispatch, 7 tools, notifications/claude/channel manual framing per spec §4.4.4. Live MCP exchange verified.

phase_9_install_plumbing.details: Plugin manifest at .claude-plugin/marketplace.json + plugins/c3/{plugin.json, .mcp.json, commands/c3-build.md, c3-setup.md, c3-status.md}. Broker subcommands: setup (token-validates via getMe before writing), status (read-only health check), validate (parse + Validate). Full first-install flow: /plugin marketplace add karthikeyan5/c3 → /plugin install c3@c3 → /reload-plugins → /c3-build → /c3-setup → restart → attach.

phase_4a_complete.summary: Channel/Host interfaces + per-route worker substrate. c3types/channel/plugin packages, RouteWorker, WorkerPool, Broker.Shutdown.

notes: Phase 1+2+3+4A complete. Plan 4B is the Telegram channel implementation — first plan that adds an external dependency and significant integration with a third-party API. Will need careful TDD given the live Bot API surface.
